items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Accordion with spring height, staggered text, default or quiet disclosure styles, and optional multi-open behavior. Built with Motion.

items.name: ai-input
items.title: AI Input
items.description: Chat-style AI composer with agent and model chips, sent-message bubbles, and an Apple Intelligence-style gradient wave on send.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Compound Alert, AlertTitle, and AlertDescription parts with optional icons, legacy prop support, polite live announcements, and inline or toast behavior.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Compound Base UI avatar with image, fallback, variant status badge, grouped stack, overflow count, auto initials, and tooltip-enabled status hints.

items.name: b-accordion
items.title: Accordion (Base UI)
items.description: Compound Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, and AccordionContent parts layered over Base UI primitives with default and quiet variants.

items.name: b-alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog (Base UI)
items.description: Alert dialog with asChild triggers, action variants, optional media, controlled async flows, and reduced-motion aware transitions layered over Base UI primitives.

items.name: b-autocomplete
items.title: Autocomplete (Base UI)
items.description: Base UI autocomplete with list filtering, suggestion highlight motion, and the same Iconiq input shell as the combobox install.

items.name: b-avatar
items.title: Avatar (Base UI)
items.description: Avatar with the same single Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, keeping immediate fallback initials and a quiet image crossfade.

items.name: b-button
items.title: Button (Base UI)
items.description: Button with embedded Iconiq theme tokens, optional loading, href link rendering, ripple, press spring, hover lift, and intrinsic-width animation over the Base UI button primitive.

items.name: b-checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox Group (Base UI)
items.description: Checkbox group with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original row hover, tap spring, checkmark draw, and disclosure behavior.

items.name: b-checkbox
items.title: Checkbox (Base UI)
items.description: Checkbox with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original fill spring, press scale, checkmark draw, and label fade.

items.name: b-collapsible
items.title: Collapsible (Base UI)
items.description: Collapsible with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the same height, icon, and content transitions as the Radix version.

items.name: b-combobox
items.title: Combobox (Base UI)
items.description: Compound Combobox parts layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original input shell, clear action, item highlight, checkmark, and dropdown motion.

items.name: b-context-menu
items.title: Context Menu (Base UI)
items.description: Composable context menu layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original panel spring, row entrance, active highlight, and shortcut layout.

items.name: b-dialog
items.title: Dialog (Base UI)
items.description: Dialog with the same exported Iconiq parts layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original dialog springs while using the softer alert-dialog card styling and overlay treatment.

items.name: b-hover-card
items.title: Hover Card (Base UI)
items.description: Hover card with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI popover primitives, preserving delayed hover reveal, instant focus open, collision-aware placement, and spring-driven content motion.

items.name: b-popover
items.title: Popover (Base UI)
items.description: Popover with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI popover primitives, preserving side-aware panel motion, optional anchor support, and size-aware content transitions.

items.name: b-progress
items.title: Progress (Base UI)
items.description: Progress bar with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the spring-smoothed fill, restrained inline readout, and quiet indeterminate motion.

items.name: b-radio-group
items.title: Radio Group (Base UI)
items.description: Radio group with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original shared highlight, spring-loaded ring and dot, and staggered row entrance.

items.name: b-select
items.title: Select (Base UI)
items.description: Compound Select parts layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original trigger press, chevron rotation, grouped rows, and panel motion.

items.name: b-selection-toolbar
items.title: Selection Toolbar (Base UI)
items.description: Floating selection toolbar with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI toolbar primitives, including viewport-aware positioning, keyboard shortcuts, and fluid button motion.

items.name: b-separator
items.title: Separator (Base UI)
items.description: Separator with line, dashed, and dotted variants layered over the Base UI primitive, supporting horizontal and vertical orientation with a decorative default.

items.name: b-slider
items.title: Slider (Base UI)
items.description: Slider with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original spring-settled fill, active track height, and thumb scale motion.

items.name: b-switch
items.title: Switch (Base UI)
items.description: Switch with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original spring thumb travel, pressure-like squash, and foreground fill sweep.

items.name: b-tabs
items.title: Tabs (Base UI)
items.description: Tabs with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the measured underline, keyboard flow, and motion-smoothed panel shell from the core tabs component.

items.name: b-toggle
items.title: Toggle (Base UI)
items.description: Two-state button with spring press feedback, a muted fill that bounces in when pressed, and a subtle content lift layered over Base UI toggle primitives.

items.name: b-togglegroup
items.title: Toggle Group (Base UI)
items.description: Segmented toggle group with the same fluid wipe fill, sheen sweep, and icon press feedback as the standalone toggle, over Base UI toggle-group primitives.

items.name: b-tooltip
items.title: Tooltip (Base UI)
items.description: Tooltip with the same Iconiq API layered over Base UI primitives, preserving the original controlled delay timing, bubble shell, rotated-square arrow, and spring entrance motion.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Preset-color badge with tinted fills, semantic aliases, animated default shimmer, dot variant, dismiss controls, and reduced-motion aware motion. Motion + CVA + Slot.

items.name: banner
items.title: Banner
items.description: Top-of-screen announcement banner with four gradient tones, a left-aligned ringed icon and message, a right-aligned outlined action, a dismiss collapse, and a fluid spring morph that melts the bar into a confirmation pill when its action is clicked.

items.name: breadcrumbs
items.title: Breadcrumbs
items.description: Compound breadcrumb trail with Base UI render composition, subtle Motion transitions, and dedicated current-page and separator parts.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: Grouped action buttons, text segments, separators, segmented button rows, and a selectable segmented control with spring-driven hover and active motion.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Primary action control with larger default hit targets, spring press feedback, optional intrinsic width animation, and Motion ripples. Forwards ref and native button props.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: shadcn-style monthly calendar with animated month/year transitions, selectable days, and date-fns-powered grid generation.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Compound card surface with optional interactive lift, Motion-smoothed layout transitions, asChild link support, semantic title slots, and shared header, action, content, and footer slots.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Embla-powered carousel with aspect-ratio presets, responsive navigation placement, and horizontal or vertical slides. Built with embla-carousel-react and Lucide.

items.name: charts
items.title: Charts
items.description: Recharts shell with registry chart tokens, ease-out series growth, and calm tooltip and legend transitions.

items.name: checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox group
items.description: Multi-select option list with bordered empty state and a primary tick only when checked, plus hover/tap motion on each row. Motion + Lucide.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Single checkbox with spring-pressed feedback, a line-drawn checkmark, and an optional inline label. Motion only.

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Editor-style code block with a filename tab, a top-right spring-crossfade copy button, a bottom status bar with language and line count, line numbers, built-in theme-aware syntax highlighting, and line emphasis.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color Picker
items.description: HSV panel with saturation field, hue/alpha sliders, multi-format readouts, hex input, and EyeDropper.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Searchable single-select input with inline filtering, arrow-key navigation, animated dropdown motion, and an optional clear action.

items.name: command-palette
items.title: Command Palette
items.description: Radix dialog command menu with grouped search, keyboard shortcuts, navigation items, custom triggers, and optional theme switching.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Native-feeling context menu with fixed-position viewport-aware placement, per-item icons and shortcuts, and spring entrance motion.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: Collapsible date picker trigger with the shared Iconiq Calendar panel, spring open motion, and month-aware selection.

items.name: dia-text
items.title: Dia Text
items.description: Animated inline text reveal with a sweeping gradient band, repeat controls, and optional fixed-width rotation for motion-driven typography.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog on Radix Dialog with Motion overlay and content springs, staggered children, and an animated close control. Pass the same open boolean to DialogContent as the Dialog root for AnimatePresence.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Compound Vaul drawer with direction-aware layout, drag gestures, snap points, size variants, styled footer actions, optional close button, and safe-area-aware panel geometry.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: Dropdown
items.description: Animated dropdown with a selectable value mode and an action-menu mode, plus chevron rotation and spring-driven menu entry.

items.name: faq-pro
items.title: FAQ Pro
items.description: Searchable FAQ accordion with rounded cards, animated panels, automatic match expansion, and inline query highlighting. Built with Base UI Accordion, Motion, and Lucide.

items.name: favicon-badge
items.title: Favicon Badge
items.description: Circular website favicon badge with optional label text, spring entrance animation, and Google favicon resolution.

items.name: feedback
items.title: Feedback Form
items.description: Collapsed pill that morphs into an expanded feedback panel with a send button, loading state, and a textarea, driven by pure CSS transitions with asymmetric open/close easing.

items.name: file-tree
items.title: File Tree
items.description: Compound file tree with nested FileTreeItem rows, Base UI Button folder toggles, extension-aware icons, hover highlight tracking, and optional blue emphasis for new files.

items.name: file-upload
items.title: File Upload
items.description: Drag-and-drop file uploader with click-to-browse fallback, queued file rows, image previews, built-in progress states, and optional change callbacks.

items.name: flux-button
items.title: Flux Button
items.description: Async button with idle, loading, and success states.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: Inline hover card with hover-only timing delays, instant focus reveal, collision-aware Popover positioning, Slot-based custom triggers, and a spring-driven content panel.

items.name: icon-bar
items.title: Icon Bar
items.description: Row of compact icon chips that expand on hover or focus and stay open when selected. Built with Base UI Toggle Group, Motion, and Lucide.

items.name: infiniteribbon
items.title: Infinite Ribbon
items.description: Full-width looping announcement ribbon with repeated content, optional reverse direction, and diagonal rotation controls.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: Animated one-time password field built on Base UI OTP Field with focus border motion, character entrance, caret pulse, and OTPSlots auto-layout.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Input with a spring-animated caret.

items.name: logo-carousal
items.title: Logo Carousel
items.description: Multi-column logo grid that cycles through sponsor logos with a staggered wave animation.

items.name: morph-texts
items.title: Morph Text
items.description: Cycling headline words with a goo-filter morph transition powered by Motion.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Popover built on Radix with portal-based positioning, optional anchor support, side-aware motion, and smooth size changes while content updates.

items.name: r-accordion
items.title: Accordion (Radix UI)
items.description: Compound Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, and AccordionContent parts layered over Radix UI primitives with Motion-heavy panel choreography.

items.name: r-alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog (Radix UI)
items.description: Alert dialog with asChild triggers, action variants, optional media, controlled async flows, and reduced-motion aware transitions layered over Radix UI primitives.

items.name: r-avatar
items.title: Avatar (Radix UI)
items.description: Avatar with the same single Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving immediate fallback initials and the quiet image reveal.

items.name: r-checkbox
items.title: Checkbox (Radix UI)
items.description: Checkbox with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the original fill spring, press scale, checkmark draw, and label fade.

items.name: r-collapsible
items.title: Collapsible (Radix UI)
items.description: Collapsible with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the same height, icon, and content transitions as the Base UI version.

items.name: r-dialog
items.title: Dialog (Radix UI)
items.description: Dialog with the same exported Iconiq parts layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the original dialog springs while using the softer alert-dialog card styling and overlay treatment.

items.name: r-dropdown
items.title: Dropdown (Radix UI)
items.description: Dropdown with the same Iconiq trigger, grouped rows, action and select variants, and exact panel motion layered over Radix Dropdown Menu primitives.

items.name: r-hover-card
items.title: Hover Card (Radix UI)
items.description: Hover card with the same Iconiq API layered over the dedicated Radix Hover Card primitive, preserving delayed hover reveal, instant focus open, collision-aware placement, and spring-driven content motion.

items.description: Popover with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI popover primitives, preserving side-aware panel motion, optional anchor support, and size-aware content transitions.

items.description: Progress bar with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the spring-smoothed fill, restrained inline readout, and quiet indeterminate motion.

items.name: r-radio-group
items.title: Radio Group (Radix UI)
items.description: Radio group with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the original shared highlight, spring-loaded ring and dot, and staggered row entrance.

items.name: r-select
items.title: Select (Radix UI)
items.description: Compound Select parts layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the original trigger press, chevron rotation, grouped rows, and panel motion.

items.name: r-selection-toolbar
items.title: Selection Toolbar (Radix UI)
items.description: Floating selection toolbar with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI toolbar primitives, including viewport-aware positioning, keyboard shortcuts, and fluid button motion.

items.title: Separator (Radix UI)
items.description: Separator with line, dashed, and dotted variants layered over the Radix UI primitive, supporting horizontal and vertical orientation with a decorative default.

items.name: r-slider
items.title: Slider (Radix UI)
items.description: Slider with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the original spring-settled fill, active track height, and thumb scale motion.

items.name: r-switch
items.title: Switch (Radix UI)
items.description: Switch with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the original spring thumb travel, pressure-like squash, and foreground fill sweep.

items.name: r-tabs
items.title: Tabs (Radix UI)
items.description: Tabs with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix UI primitives, preserving the measured underline, keyboard flow, and motion-smoothed panel shell from the core tabs component.

items.name: r-toggle
items.title: Toggle (Radix UI)
items.description: Two-state button with spring press feedback, a muted fill that bounces in when pressed, and a subtle content lift layered over Radix UI toggle primitives.

items.name: r-togglegroup
items.title: Toggle Group (Radix UI)
items.description: Segmented toggle group with the same fluid wipe fill, sheen sweep, and icon press feedback as the standalone toggle, over Radix UI toggle-group primitives.

items.name: r-tooltip
items.title: Tooltip (Radix UI)
items.description: Tooltip with the same Iconiq API layered over Radix Tooltip primitives, preserving the original controlled delay timing, bubble shell, rotated-square arrow, and spring entrance motion.

items.name: radial-button
items.title: Radial Button
items.description: Rounded action button with a radial foreground fill that spreads on hover or focus-visible. Built with Motion.

items.name: radiogroup
items.title: Radio group
items.description: Single-select option list with shared layoutId highlight, spring ring/dot on the control, staggered row entrance, and optional descriptions. Motion only — native button radios with role=radiogroup.

items.name: reasoning-steps
items.title: Reasoning Steps
items.description: Base UI collapsible reasoning trace for AI replies with a shimmering trigger label and no status icon, per-step dots that pop into checkmarks once done, a self-timing elapsed-seconds readout, a crossfading collapsed preview of the current step, and a staggered vertical timeline once expanded.

items.name: reveal-text
items.title: Reveal Text
items.description: Staggered word or character reveal with spring lift, blur fade, and optional scroll-triggered playback.

items.name: rolling-digits
items.title: Rolling Digits
items.description: Spring-animated digit counter with transform, opacity, and vertical motion.

items.name: scroll-progress
items.title: Scroll Progress
items.description: Ruler-style scroll indicator with tick marks that fill in as the page scrolls and a live percentage readout, dockable to either side or bottom corner of the viewport or a scrollable container.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Animated single-select dropdown with staggered options, chevron rotation, scaleY panel, row hover slide, and check mark on the active item. Motion + Lucide.

items.name: selectiontoolbar
items.title: Selection Toolbar
items.description: Floating inline formatting toolbar for editable text selections with viewport-aware positioning, keyboard shortcuts, theme tokens, and bold, italic, underline, link, copy, and strikethrough actions.

items.name: setup-checklist
items.title: Setup Checklist
items.description: Animated onboarding checklist card with staggered task rows, a drawn checkmark badge, and a floating progress pill with a spring-smoothed pie.

items.name: shimmer-text
items.title: Shimmer Text
items.description: Animated shimmer text with a sweeping highlight band, adjustable spread, and configurable loop speed for emphasis-heavy copy.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Shimmer or fade loading placeholder with preset helpers, configurable radius, optional animation, and embedded theme tokens.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Range control with spring-animated track and thumb, full-width pointer drag, and optional label and live value. Motion.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Loading indicator with ring, bouncing dots, or dot-matrix sweep variants. Motion; uses primary and muted theme tokens.

items.name: status-dot
items.title: Status Dot
items.description: Rippling inline status dot with deployment presets, generic tones, sizing, and dot-only accessibility defaults.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Animated Radix switch with spring thumb travel, pressure-like thumb squash, foreground track fill, and optional inline label.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Composable table primitives with grid-aligned rows, optional animated sort buttons, and layout-preserving row transitions.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Segmented tabs with a sliding active pill, mix-blend label treatment, and Radix keyboard navigation.

items.name: team-invitation
items.title: Team Invitation
items.description: Team invitation block with fluid morphing variants for inviting members, managing the team, assigning roles, and tracking pending invites.

items.name: testimonials
items.title: Testimonials
items.description: Inline testimonial wall where hovering one quote blurs and dims the rest while the author attribution reveals beside the highlighted quote. Pure CSS :has()-driven hover state — no per-frame JS animation.

items.name: text-inertia
items.title: Text Inertia
items.description: Pointer-reactive word treatment that maps cursor velocity into Motion-powered spring movement.

items.name: text-loop
items.title: Text Loop
items.description: Cycling text with vertical slide transitions—pass your own items and interval for rotating headlines or status copy.

items.name: theme-toggle
items.title: Theme Toggle
items.description: Animated light/dark switch with a sliding knob, sun and moon icons, and bouncy track transitions. Built with Base UI Toggle; toggles the document dark class.

items.name: thinking-indicator
items.title: Thinking Indicator
items.description: AI loading state with a sparkle glyph that wobbles through liquid blob keyframes into a circle while a companion twinkle blooms on the same timeline, cycling status words that slide through a soft blur, a per-word shimmer sweep, layout-stable width, and reduced-motion aware behavior.

items.name: timezone
items.title: Timezone
items.description: Inline live clock for city aliases or IANA timezones with fluid digit rolls, pulsing separators, and spring transitions.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Animated hover/focus tooltip with collision-aware portaled positioning, Slot-based triggers, short-string content, and optional delay and side placement. Built with Motion and Radix Popover.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Looping typewriter text effect with brief glitch substitutions and a blinking cursor.

items.name: typography
items.title: Typography
items.description: Single typography primitive that maps the full heading, label, paragraph, subheading, and documentation scale through one variant prop.

items.name: verified-badge
items.title: Verified Badge
items.description: X-style verified scallop with shimmer or static variants, size presets, brand/gold/neutral tones, and reduced-motion aware animation.

items.name: iconiq-theme
items.title: Iconiq theme tokens
items.description: Shared Tailwind arbitrary property tokens used by Iconiq registry components.
